name: bitplus-signal
description: Public-intent signal finder for BTC++ and technical conference communities.

scripts.build: tsc && node dist/cli.js build --events data/events/btcplusplus-2026.json --signals data/reviewed/toronto-real-signals.json --out public/data --event-id btcpp-toronto-2026 --trust-graph data/trust/toronto-trust-seeds.json data/reviewed/toronto-real-trust-slice.json --source-log data/sources/real-data-run-log.json
scripts.build:sample: tsc && node dist/cli.js build --events data/events/btcplusplus-2026.json --signals data/samples/toronto-signals.json --out public/data --event-id btcpp-toronto-2026 --trust-graph data/trust/toronto-trust-seeds.json
scripts.build:all: tsc && node dist/cli.js build --events data/events/btcplusplus-2026.json --signals data/samples/signals.json --out public/data
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx serve public
scripts.review:nostr-graph: tsx src/cli.ts review-nostr-graph --graph data/real/nostr-trust-graph.json --out data/reviewed/toronto-real-signals.json --trust-slice-out data/reviewed/toronto-real-trust-slice.json --limit 12 --source-lane nostr_graph --posted-at 2026-06-17
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run scan:private
